actions.name: Create Jira ticket
actions.description: Creates a Jira ticket based on newly opened GitHub issues, syncing relevant information such as the issue title and number. It utilizes a GitHub Action to facilitate the transfer of data from GitHub to Jira, ensuring that issues are tracked in both systems.

actions.name: Sync board list
actions.description: Updates the board JSON in the armbian/armbian.github.io repository based on changes to board configuration files. Sends a repository dispatch event to trigger further processing for generating a build engine inventory.

actions.name: Sync labels
actions.description: Syncs labels from a YAML file to issues and pull requests based on modifications. Applies labels automatically when changes are detected in the specified YAML file, enhancing issue and PR management. Supports a dry-run mode for pull requests to preview label changes before application.
actions.execution_method: workflow_dispatch, push to main branch, pull_request for .github/labels.yml

actions.name: Sync maintainers
actions.description: Syncs maintainers' information from a contacts database to board configuration files, updating the BOARD_MAINTAINER property. If changes are detected, it creates a Pull Request to reflect these updates. The process includes downloading a JSON file, parsing it, and modifying configuration files accordingly.

actions.name: Sync tools
actions.description: Updates versions of specified tools in scripts by checking the latest releases from their respective repositories and creating a pull request if an update is necessary. This workflow acts as a self-created dependabot for tools that cannot be updated by standard methods. New tools can be added easily by modifying the matrix configuration.
actions.cron_schedule: at 42 minutes past the hour, at 3:00, on day 16

actions.name: Dispatch to fork
actions.description: Dispatches events to forked repositories based on various GitHub actions. It sends a repository dispatch event with details about the triggering event, including references and SHA. This operation is conditioned to run only on forked repositories and requires a valid secret for authentication.

actions.name: Mirror to Codeberg
actions.description: Pushes the contents of the repository to the Codeberg mirror, ensuring that the latest changes are reflected in the external repository. It checks out the full history of the repository before mirroring to maintain complete commit history.

actions.name: Announce merge
actions.description: Announces merges to the main branch by sending a notification to Discord with details about the merge, including the repository, actor, and commit message.

actions.name: Announce PR
actions.description: Announces pull requests labeled for maintenance on Discord for review, providing details about the PR and the author. It sends a formatted message including the repository name, author, and a link to the PR.

actions.name: Auto-label PR
actions.description: Automatically labels pull requests based on size, file categories, and creation date, while also removing the 'Ready to merge' label when a PR is updated. It categorizes PRs using a predefined configuration and assigns size labels based on the number of changed lines. Additionally, it tracks PRs by assigning quarterly labels based on their creation month.

actions.name: Build artifacts
actions.description: Generates build artifacts for pull requests labeled with 'Build' by authorized members of the 'Release manager' team. It checks user membership before proceeding to compile the artifacts, ensuring only eligible contributors can trigger the build process.

actions.name: Check board assets
actions.description: Verifies assets for newly added board configurations by checking for the existence of required images and vendor logos in a specified repository. It identifies new board config files in a pull request and validates that corresponding images and logos are present, generating a comment with any missing items. If assets are missing, it prompts contributors to add them to the appropriate repository.

actions.name: Analyze kernel security
actions.description: Analyzes Linux kernel security options against hardening standards. Checks for security issues in kernel configuration files and summarizes findings in the GitHub Actions job summary. Excludes RISC-V configurations due to lack of support.

actions.name: Clean workflow logs
actions.description: Cleans up old workflow logs by deleting runs older than a specified number of days. It can be executed on a defined schedule or manually through workflow dispatch with customizable parameters for the age of logs to delete.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, at 0:00, on Mon

actions.name: Label PR on approval
actions.description: Labels pull requests as 'Ready to merge' upon approval and removes review-related labels. Downloads the pull request number from a previous workflow run and checks for approval before applying the label. Sends a confirmation comment when the label is applied successfully.

actions.name: Lint scripts
actions.description: Runs ShellCheck on all scripts to analyze shell script quality and generates a report as a build artifact. It checks for errors in modified files while ensuring that only relevant scripts are analyzed based on specific criteria. The analysis is performed on pull requests and can also be triggered manually.

actions.name: Listen PR review
actions.description: Saves the pull request number when a review is approved and uploads it as an artifact. This facilitates tracking and referencing the approved pull request in subsequent processes.

actions.name: Rewrite kernel configs
actions.description: Builds dynamic matrices for kernel configuration rewrites and executes the rewrite process for each configuration. Collects changes, aggregates them into a single pull request, and summarizes the modifications made across different kernel configurations. The workflow ensures that only the necessary updates are applied based on the inventory of boards and their respective branches.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, at 0:00, on MON

actions.name: Rewrite patches
actions.description: Rewrites kernel or U-Boot patches for a specified board and branch, updating the repository and compiling changes. It checks for modifications, generates a pull request if changes are detected, and provides a summary of the changes made. Temporary files are cleaned up after the process completes.

actions.name: Security scan
actions.description: Runs security scans using Scorecards to analyze the codebase for vulnerabilities and best practices. Publishes results to the code-scanning dashboard and uploads the results as artifacts for further review. The analysis is performed on the default branch during scheduled intervals or on pushes to the main branch.
actions.cron_schedule: at 30 minutes past the hour, at 1:00, on Sat

actions.name: Watchdog
actions.description: Monitors and reruns failed jobs for specified workflows, ensuring stability in CI/CD processes. It checks the latest run status and triggers a rerun if the previous attempt failed and hasn't exceeded the maximum retry limit. This helps maintain the reliability of automated workflows.

actions.name: Welcome first-time issue contributor
actions.description: Welcomes first-time issue contributors by sending a personalized message and labeling their issue as 'Good first issue'. It encourages engagement with the project and provides a link for sharing contact preferences. This enhances community involvement and support for new contributors.

actions.name: Welcome first-time PR contributor
actions.description: Welcomes first-time pull request contributors by sending a personalized message. It acknowledges their contribution and encourages further engagement with the project. The message includes a link for sharing contact preferences and a reminder to star the repository.
